# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based frontend application for Human Resources management. It follows a component-driven architecture with:

- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build System**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with a design system based on shadcn/ui components
- **Routing**: React Router for client-side navigation
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state management and caching
- **Backend**: Supabase providing PostgreSQL database, authentication, and serverless functions

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Component Organization
- **Atomic Design**: UI components range from basic atoms (buttons, inputs) to complex organisms (forms, layouts)
- **Feature-based Structure**: Components grouped by domain (evaluations, finance, leave, etc.)
- **Composition over Inheritance**: Heavy use of React composition patterns

### Data Flow
- **Supabase Integration**: Direct database queries using Supabase client
- **Query Caching**: TanStack Query manages data fetching, caching, and synchronization
- **Real-time Updates**: Supabase subscriptions for live data updates where needed

### Authentication & Authorization
- **Role-based Access**: Different views and permissions based on user roles (employee, team_lead, hr_manager, ceo)
- **Route Protection**: Components check user roles before rendering sensitive content

## Database Schema Highlights

Based on the migration files, the system manages:

- **Employees**: User profiles with roles, departments, and company associations
- **Evaluations**: Both quarterly performance reviews and daily feedback
- **Leave Management**: Leave types, balances, and request workflows
- **Payroll**: Salary calculations with overtime, bonuses, and deductions
- **Finance**: Monthly expenses and financial tracking
- **Projects**: Project management with tasks and activity logging
- **Settings**: Configurable departments, roles, policies, and categories

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders the root App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main app component with routing setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Root page component (Next.js-style pages router)

### Layout Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application shell with sidebar and topbar
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation with user menu and notifications

### Feature Components
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx`: Timeline view of employee evaluations
- `src/components/finance/FinanceSummary.tsx`: Financial dashboard with charts and KPIs
- `src/components/leave/ApplyLeaveModal.tsx`: Modal for submitting leave requests
- `src/components/payroll/PayrollSummary.tsx`: Payroll data display and calculations

### Utility and Configuration
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for className merging)
- `src/lib/format-date.ts`: Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based permission checking
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration

### UI Component Library
- `src/components/ui/`: Complete set of shadcn/ui components (buttons, forms, dialogs, etc.)
- All components follow the same API patterns and styling conventions

## Business Logic

### Evaluation System
- **Quarterly Evaluations**: Comprehensive performance reviews with scores and recommendations
- **Daily Evaluations**: Quick feedback between team members
- **Visibility Rules**: Role-based access to evaluation data (managers see more than employees)

### Finance & Payroll
- **Monthly Processing**: Payroll calculations include base salary, overtime, bonuses, and deductions
- **Expense Tracking**: Monthly expense categories and amounts
- **Currency**: Pakistani Rupee (PKR) formatting throughout

### Leave Management
- **Leave Types**: Configurable leave categories (annual, sick, etc.)
- **Balance Tracking**: Automatic calculation of remaining leave days
- **Approval Workflow**: Request submission and approval process

## Development Workflow

- **Build Tool**: Vite provides fast HMR and optimized production builds
- **TypeScript**: Strict type checking enabled
- **Linting**: ESLint with React and TypeScript rules
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit testing with React Testing Library
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens

## Deployment Considerations

- **Static Hosting**: Built as a SPA suitable for static hosting (Vercel, Netlify, etc.)
- **Environment Variables**: Supabase configuration via VITE_ prefixed env vars
- **Database**: Supabase handles database hosting and migrations
- **Edge Functions**: Serverless functions for complex business logic (payroll generation, notifications)

## Common Patterns

- **Query Keys**: Consistent TanStack Query key patterns for caching
- **Error Handling**: Try-catch blocks with user-friendly error messages
- **Loading States**: Skeleton components for better UX during data fetching
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile-first approach with Tailwind breakpoints
- **Accessibility**: ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation support
